description: Pre-configured MCP servers available for one-click connection in ReClaw.

servers.name: MCP Brasil
servers.description: Access 28 Brazilian government APIs (213 tools) covering economics, legislation, judiciary, elections, environment, health, and public procurement. Ideal for UX research involving Brazilian public data, government service evaluation, and civic tech analysis.

env_vars.name: TRANSPARENCIA_API_KEY
env_vars.description: Portal da Transparencia API key (free registration at portaldatransparencia.gov.br)

env_vars.name: DATAJUD_API_KEY
env_vars.description: DataJud/CNJ API key (free registration at datajud.cnj.jus.br)

env_vars.name: MCP_BRASIL_TOOL_SEARCH
env_vars.description: Tool search mode: bm25 (default), code_mode, or none

features.name: Banco Central (BCB)
features.description: Selic rate, IPCA inflation, 190+ economic series, currency exchange

features.name: IBGE
features.description: Census data, demographic statistics, economic indicators

features.name: Portal da Transparência
features.description: Federal contracts, sanctions, accountability (requires API key)

features.name: DataJud (CNJ)
features.description: Court processes, rulings from STF, STJ, TST (requires API key)

ux_research_applications: Evaluate government digital services by cross-referencing official data with user experience findings
Research public service accessibility by analyzing healthcare facility distribution (DataSUS)
Investigate civic tech usability by correlating user behavior with legislative data (Câmara/Senado)
Benchmark government portal performance against Doherty Threshold using transparency data
Analyze election information accessibility across regions using TSE data
Cross-reference environmental monitoring UX with INPE deforestation/fire data
Study public procurement portal usability using PNCP contract data
